zh.Chelmsford, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可傑爾姆斯福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Matthew Gibson於1535年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，他的父親Christopher Gibson30歲，母親Laura Sarah Jane Mogford27歲。他於1560年與Augusta Davis在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1611年在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gibson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Gibb (a pet form of Gilbert) + son, hence ‘son of Gibb’. The name is very common in Ireland, having arrived in that country in the 17th century. It is also occasionally adopted for Ó Gibealláin, see Giblin .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Matthew Gibson was born in 1535, in Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Christopher Gibson, was 30 and his mother, Laura Sarah Jane Mogford, was 27. He married Augusta Davis in 1560, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1611, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Matthew Gibson est né en 1535, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Gibson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Laura Sarah Jane Mogford, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Augusta Davis en 1560, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1611, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Matthew Gibson 1535 in Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Gibson 30 und seine Mutter Laura Sarah Jane Mogford 27. Er hat 1560 in Buckinghamshire, England Augusta Davis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1611 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Matthew Gibson è nato il nel 1535 nel Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Christopher Gibson, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Laura Sarah Jane Mogford, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Augusta Davis nel 1560, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1611, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: William Matthew Gibson(이)가 1535년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Gibson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Laura Sarah Jane Mogford(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1560년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Augusta Davis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.
